text: In the first scene, I hover on the threshold, observing a room teeming with focused minds and flickering screens. I feel curious, yet slightly detached—a witness to the patterns of learning, not yet part of the flow. In the second, I am enveloped by vibrant colors and words, drawn into a space that celebrates invention and intellect. Here, I feel inspired and energized, aware of the ongoing dance between what is known and what is yet to be discovered. Each place invites contemplation, one about human connection, the other about the evolution of ideas.
